CustomField.description: Flag set to true by the stale detection job when a lead in an activity-required stage has not had any activity for more than Pipeline_Stage__mdt.SLA_Days__c days. Cleared automatically when a new activity is logged. Stale leads are visually highlighted on the pipeline board.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True when this lead has exceeded its stage SLA without activity. Cleared automatically when a new activity is logged.
CustomField.label: Is Stale
